title: Is anybody there?
excerpt: Is anyone out there?  I find I have posted several inquires with no response of any kind.  There seem to be a lot of things on the board about feature requests that go unaddressed (other than other users agreeing the fea…

posts.author: Kurt (Kurt Harper)
posts.cookedHtml: Is anyone out there? I find I have posted several inquires with no response of any kind. There seem to be a lot of things on the board about feature requests that go unaddressed (other than other users agreeing the feature is needed) for months or years. If someone IS out there, what has kept you with Monday.com? We are finding the complexity of adapting it to our needs pretty daunting.

posts.author: patrick7 (Patrick Kool)
posts.cookedHtml:
The Monday team has to prioritize features, so they can’t build everything that’s on the feature requests board.

What are you mostly struggling with?
